message:
fix(security): Validate SSH targets in remoteCass hosts

Add validation for remoteCass SSH targets to prevent command injection:
- Reject empty ssh targets
- Reject targets starting with '-' (flag injection)
- Reject targets containing whitespace (argument injection)
- Classify validation failures with helpful error messages
- Use '<query>' placeholder in suggestedFix instead of raw query text
